author: pk910
content:
I'm working on a bigger refactoring of the builderapi, that should fix this issue too.
In the current builder api implementation the payload is released immediately and only on the post beacon_block call.
In my refactoring, the payload takes the usual deleayed reveal path as if the p2p bid was won.


Can you share your config?  I've had some troubles finding a usable post-gloas builder api client config 😉
